configurations.name: api
runtimeArgs: cd api && DATABASE_URL='postgresql+psycopg://aiuma:aiuma@localhost:15432/horseracing' DISPERSION_BOUNDARY_PATH="$(cd .. && pwd)/artifacts/dispersion_bands/dispbands-v1.json" DISPERSION_PCAL_PATH="$(cd .. && pwd)/artifacts/dispersion_bands/pcal-v1.json" uv run uvicorn horseracing_api.app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
